Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kaipo Young, Esq. 510-444-2404 x23 of Leader Picone & Young for PLAINTIFF 690 MARKET CLUB OWNER ASSOCIATION.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested.Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 690 MARKET CLUB OWNER ASSOCIATION's Motion To Reclassify Case As An Unlimited Civil Case.

Plaintiff 690 Market Club Owners Association's motion to reclassify case as an unlimited civil case is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
